c.d: Whether the app is available on major platforms like iOS, Android, desktop, and others to ensure accessibility for users.
The quantity and comprehensiveness of the podcast catalog available within the app.
How simple, intuitive, and user-friendly the app interface is for browsing, playing, and managing podcasts.
Special functionalities such as voice boost, silence trimming, playback speed adjustment, sleep timer, and curated playlists.
Pricing model: free, freemium, subscription cost, and availability of premium features or ad-free listening.
Level of data collection, permissions required, and privacy protections offered by the app.
Effectiveness of algorithmic or curated recommendations that help users find new podcasts tailored to their interests.
